overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game showing the interior of a cozy, rustic cottage or tavern with a large stone fireplace, wooden beams, and warm firelight. The scene features high-quality atmospheric lighting with no camera movement or character action, emphasizing the detailed environment and ambient mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cottage interior with stone hearth

agents.ego_description: standing still in the room, observing the fireplace and the warm ambient surroundings

entered.detail: large arched stone fireplace with active burning fire and metal grate
ornate iron lantern suspended from wooden ceiling beam
decorative tapestry with coat of arms hanging on back wall
tall dark wooden shelving unit with bottles and objects
brown leather armchair with visible texture in right foreground
open doorway revealing green foliage and outdoor vegetation
thick wooden mantelpiece above the fireplace
exposed heavy wooden beams supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a cozy, rustic interior dominated by a large stone fireplace with a roaring fire at the center. The room features exposed wooden ceiling beams, a hanging iron lantern, and a heraldic banner on the back wall. To the right, a tall wooden cabinet stands near a leather armchair, while an open doorway on the left reveals greenery outside, all bathed in warm firelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic gaze upon a cozy rustic interior that remains bathed in the steady, warm glow of a central hearth. It begins with a focus on a large stone fireplace where a roaring fire casts flickering light across exposed wooden ceiling beams and a hanging iron lantern. As the eye wanders through the space, the warmth extends to a heraldic banner on the back wall and a tall wooden cabinet positioned beside a leather armchair. The scene finally settles on the contrast between the amber-lit room and the glimpse of natural greenery visible through an open doorway to the left.
